# Version 3.119.3
> **Native dependency refresh preview** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.3-preview)
> **Superseded by [3.119.4](3.119.4.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.119.4.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.3/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.3 previewed a broad native-dependency refresh and a NativeAOT crash fix. The preview rolled the bundled libpng, libwebp and brotli, added Spectre mitigation to the Linux native, and fixed a NativeAOT crash when reflection is disabled. This line was never released as stable — everything here rolled up into 3.119.4.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Bumps libpng to 1.6.54, libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and removes a few unused externals so the surface stays lean. ([#3452](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3452), [#3469](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3469), [#3478](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3478), [#3463](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3463))
- **Skia submodule re-pointed at the squashed commit** — Repoints the Skia submodule at the squashed upstream commit so the merge history is clean going into 3.119.4. ([#3474](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3474))

## Bug Fixes

- **NativeAOT crash with `IlcDisableReflection=true` fixed** — Fixes a crash when SkiaSharp is consumed from a NativeAOT app that has reflection disabled via `IlcDisableReflection=true`. ([#3485](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3485))
- **Linux ARM64 no longer crashes on missing fontconfig** — Adds the fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 builds locate fontconfig at runtime and no longer crash on first text draw. ([#3494](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3494))

## Security

- **Spectre mitigation on libSkiaSharp for Linux and Windows** — Enables the Spectre mitigation compiler flag for `libSkiaSharp.dll` on Windows and `libSkiaSharp.so` on Linux to reduce the impact of speculative-execution side-channel attacks. — ❤️ [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@sshumakov](https://github.com/sshumakov) | Added the Spectre mitigation compiler flag to `libSkiaSharp.dll` and `libSkiaSharp.so` ([#3496](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3496), [#3502](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3502)) |

## Preview 1 (February 7, 2026)

Preview 1 rolled libpng, libwebp and brotli, pruned unused externals, fixed the NativeAOT `IlcDisableReflection` crash and the Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash, and enabled Spectre mitigation on the Windows and Linux native binaries.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2...v3.119.3-preview.1.1)
